text: Here is the dataset for the Sub-Task 1 of the "Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation" track at Touché 2025. It contains document segments sampled from the MS MARCO V2.1 corpus which are relevant to generated queries from the Webis Generated Native Ads 2024 corpus. The goal is to investigate the positioning of advertisement content in RAG models.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
